description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a low-pitched, gable roof and a rectangular footprint, set on a green lawn base. The front facade features a covered porch area with visible support columns and a central entrance, flanked by large windows that allow ample natural light. The roof is broad and overhangs the walls, providing shade and architectural interest. The exterior walls appear to be finished in a light color, possibly stucco or painted siding, with contrasting trim around the windows and doors. The rear and side views show additional windows, suggesting a well-ventilated and naturally lit interior. The overall design is compact and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, covered front porch, and large windows, set on a green lawn. The exterior is light-colored with contrasting trim and a simple, functional layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, central entrance, and large front windows.
description_view_1: Rear view with a back entrance and smaller windows, less architectural detail than the front.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the bungalow, multiple windows, and the roof overhang.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with additional windows and the side profile of the porch roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
